title: Sunday Aerobic Absorb
objective: Absorb Saturday's threshold check while keeping low-cost aerobic frequency.
why_now: Saturday's threshold check passed, but it ran longer and hotter than prescribed. Sunday should support adaptation without stacking fatigue.

source_context.week_objective: Restart rhythm and validate threshold readiness without catch-up fatigue.

targets.notes: Outdoor only if it is easy to fit. Default is about 100 minutes at 55-68% FTP. Extend only if legs are clearly normal; skip if sleep or legs are poor.

steps.notes: Easy aerobic absorb. Keep climbs controlled and pressure light.

nutrition.pre: Carb-forward meal 2-4h before with about 1-2g carbs/kg.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst. Use 20-40g carbs if riding near 100 minutes or starting hungry.
nutrition.post: 25-35g protein plus normal carbs; use a simple recovery meal if dinner is delayed.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: electrolytes/sodium if hot or heavy sweating; otherwise none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Normal meal with protein and fluids to thirst. Easy walking if legs tighten.
recovery.evening: No extra training. Protect sleep and Monday freshness.
recovery.next_morning_check: If legs are heavy or HRV/resting HR worsens, reduce Tuesday gym lower-body work.

skill_focus.action: Keep climbs capped and seated when practical.
skill_focus.why: This builds aerobic durability without turning endurance into threshold spikes.

skill_focus.action: Check shoulders, jaw, and grip every 20-30 minutes.
skill_focus.why: Relaxed upper body reduces wasted energy over longer rides.

mental_focus.intention: Build patient durability and fuel early.
mental_focus.why: Long aerobic consistency makes higher FTP usable outside, not only in short efforts.
mental_focus.reset: If you get impatient or chase speed, drink, eat if due, relax grip, and ride below the endurance cap for 2 minutes.

pre_interval_cues: Start only if legs feel normal after Saturday.
If sleep is poor, legs are heavy, or the day is crowded, skip without debt.
execution_notes.if_too_easy: Good. Stop around the planned duration unless recovery is unusually clean.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: Shorten to an easy endurance ride or stop.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Finish steady, fueled, and not depleted.
